sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15238" key="a(rmatodrome/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁρμᾰτο-δρομέω</orth>, <sense id="n15238.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">race in a chariot,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0548.tlg001.perseus-grc1:3:5:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollod.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.5.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
